mapper.sql: id, user_id, review_date, completed_items, unfinished_items, unfinished_reason, overall_evaluation, tomorrow_plan, review_score, created_at, updated_at, deleted_flag
mapper.insert: INSERT INTO daily_review ( user_id, review_date, completed_items, unfinished_items, unfinished_reason, overall_evaluation, tomorrow_plan, review_score, created_at, updated_at, deleted_flag ) VALUES ( #{userId}, #{reviewDate}, #{completedItems}, #{unfinishedItems}, #{unfinishedReason}, #{overallEvaluation}, #{tomorrowPlan}, #{reviewScore}, #{createdAt}, #{updatedAt}, #{deletedFlag} )
mapper.select: SELECT user_id FROM daily_review WHERE id = #{id} AND deleted_flag = 0 LIMIT 1
SELECT COUNT(1) FROM daily_review WHERE user_id = #{userId} AND deleted_flag = 0
mapper.update: UPDATE daily_review SET review_date = #{dailyReview.reviewDate}, completed_items = #{dailyReview.completedItems}, unfinished_items = #{dailyReview.unfinishedItems}, unfinished_reason = #{dailyReview.unfinishedReason}, overall_evaluation = #{dailyReview.overallEvaluation}, tomorrow_plan = #{dailyReview.tomorrowPlan}, review_score = #{dailyReview.reviewScore}, updated_at = #{dailyReview.updatedAt} WHERE id = #{dailyReview.id} AND user_id = #{userId} AND deleted_flag = 0

UPDATE daily_review SET review_date = #{dailyReview.reviewDate}, completed_items = #{dailyReview.completedItems}, unfinished_items = #{dailyReview.unfinishedItems}, unfinished_reason = #{dailyReview.unfinishedReason}, overall_evaluation = #{dailyReview.overallEvaluation}, tomorrow_plan = #{dailyReview.tomorrowPlan}, review_score = #{dailyReview.reviewScore}, updated_at = #{dailyReview.updatedAt}, deleted_flag = 0 WHERE id = #{dailyReview.id} AND user_id = #{userId} AND deleted_flag = 1
